title: cirsium × hungaricum
intro: Cirsium × hungaricum, also known as the Hungarian thistle or Hungarian prickly thistle, is a hybrid plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Cirsium × hungaricum can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
